description.brief: Verify radio setting, decode, and playback path

verification.description: 1. Set radio frequency, volume, and radio on or off selection through the user interface. 1. Provide a usable radio transmission to the device. 1. Confirm the device derives current frequency, activation, and volume level from the user settings. 1. Confirm the radio subsystem decodes radio waves into radio signals and broadcasts radio sound to the user.
